description_long: This is an ornate wall-mounted lamp featuring a decorative brass or gold-toned metal frame with intricate scrollwork and embellishments. The lamp has a prominent, round, marble-like medallion at its base and a smaller matching accent below it, both set into the metal structure. The light source is covered by a flared, fabric lampshade with gold trim, giving it a classic and elegant appearance. The arm of the lamp curves outward from the wall mount, supporting the shade and bulb. The overall design is reminiscent of vintage or antique wall sconces often found in upscale urban environments. The materials and craftsmanship suggest a blend of functionality and decorative appeal.
description: An ornate wall-mounted lamp with a gold-toned metal frame, marble accents, and a flared fabric shade with gold trim. The design is vintage and decorative, suitable for upscale urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical metal frame, marble medallions, and the full face of the flared fabric shade.
description_view_1: Side angle highlighting the curved metal arm, the depth of the marble medallion, and the profile of the lampshade.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the lampshade and the decorative metalwork extending from the wall mount.
description_view_3: Opposite side angle showing the curvature of the arm and the layered structure of the marble and metal base.
